zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan )於1280年出生在威爾士丹比爾盧阿邦時，他的父親Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children31歲，母親Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith31歲。他於大約1301年與Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan在威爾士梅利奧爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1356年在威爾士丹比爾格林-迪福德享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan )于1280年出生在威尔士丹比爾盧阿邦时，他的父亲Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children31岁，母亲Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith31岁。他于大约1301年与Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan在威尔士梅利奧爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1356年在威尔士丹比爾格林-迪福德享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.
Swedish: variant of   Ahl  .

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Spanish (Andalusia; Alé): unexplained.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French Canadian: variant of   Madore  .

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Fought
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Vogt  .

variants.name: Vogt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Hans, Armin, Erna, Fritz, Gerhard, Gunter, Helmut, Alois, Erwin, Guenther.

German: occupational name for a reeve, a bailiff, a farm manager, or other person with supervisory authority, Middle High German voget, Late Latin vocatus, from Latin advocatus, past participle of advocare ‘to call upon (to help)’. The term originally denoted someone who appeared before a court on behalf of some party not permitted to make direct representations, often an ecclesiastical body which was not supposed to have any dealings with temporal authorities. In some parts of central Europe, the word came to mean ‘village headman’. This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Norway, and Poland. See also Fath , Focht , Vaeth , Voigt , and Voit , compare Faught , Fought , Vaught , Voght , Voight , Vote , and Vought .

nameMeanings.name: At
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.
Swedish: variant of   Ahl  .

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Spanish (Andalusia; Alé): unexplained.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Vietnamese: unexplained.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Zheng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Yi, Bin, Hong, Hua, Li, Wei, Yong, Ting, Xin, Yan, Hui, Min, Hao, Shen, Da, Quan, Tian, Chong.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 鄭: from Zheng (鄭), the name of a state (located in part of present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) granted to You, the younger brother of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). The state of Zheng was annexed by the state of Han (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Battle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French de la bataile ‘(man) of the battle-array; warrior’. This name was taken to Scotland by a family from Umfreville, France, in the early 13th century.
Irish (Sligo and Mayo): adopted for Mac Concatha, ‘son of Cú Chatha’ a personal name meaning ‘hound of battle’ (where con is genitive of cú ‘hound’ + cath ‘battle’).
History: A John Battle from Yorkshire, England, settled in 1654 on the Nansemond, a stream in VA. His descendants became prominent in NC and GA.

variants.name: Battles
meanings: English: variant of   Battle  .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Crecy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English:  see  Creasey  .

variants.name: Creasey
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, or Norman origin): habitational name from Cressy in Seine-Maritime, France (see   Cressy  ).
Possibly an Americanized form of any of the German names mentioned at   Creasy  .

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) was born in 1280, in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, was 31 and his mother, Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith, was 31. He married Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan about 1301, in Merionethshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1356, in Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) est né en 1280, à Ruabon, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan environ 1301, à Merionethshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1356, à Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) 1280 in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children 31 und seine Mutter Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith 31. Er hat um 1301 in Merionethshire, Wales Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1356 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) è nato il nel 1280 nel Ruabon, Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan circa 1301, nel Merionethshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1356, nel Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan )が1280年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルアボンで生まれた時，父Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Childrenは31歳，母Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffithは31歳であった。約1301年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアでAlice verch Bleddyn Vaughanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1356年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアグリン-ディフルドウイで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan )(이)가 1280년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루압에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1301년 웨일스 머이오네스실르에서 Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1356년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 그리-디프르드w이에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) nasceu em 1280, em Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan aproximadamente 1301, em Merionethshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1356, em Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Gales, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) родился в 1280 г. в местности руабон, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan около 1301 г. в местности мириоунетшир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1356 г. в местности глин-дифрдви, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) nació en 1280, en Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eva verch Griffith ap Einion ap Griffith, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alice verch Bleddyn Vaughan aproximadamente 1301, en Merionethshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1356, en Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 76 años.
